images.prompt: Premium editorial illustration, high-end tech magazine style: a serene, immaculate network operations center — one engineer calmly reading at a tidy console, wall panels glowing a steady soft cream; behind them, seen through a glass wall and slightly blurred, a second control room frozen mid-chaos with chairs pushed back and panels flaring red. The calm room is the achievement; the exciting one is the warning. Deep dark navy (#161a45) dominant palette, soft cream (#F4EFE3) highlights, thin red (#eb2027) accents confined to the chaotic room behind the glass — no green, no purple, no rainbow palettes. No readable text, letters, or numbers anywhere. Cinematic moody lighting, minimalist composition.
